name_cn:
Black Leather Small
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't you know about this yet? It's gone viral, sisters.
Dior has truly mastered the art of a relaxed vibe this year.
The new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
Hard to get, not less than the series, just kidding haha.
Casual yet high-end street style, changing from the usual sweet look.
The key is its multi-functional shoulder strap, all three ways look good.
Large leather pull tabs on both sides add personality, accented with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo.
Both decorative and practical.
Size: 25.5×14.5×14cm
